        👋 Hello everyone! We are happy to be back. We first launched Dev On Demand & Design On Demand here on Product Hunt :) Thanks to all of the community members who gave us their feedback and used our services for their next projects! items.title: BreakBot — Auto add breaks to your calendar before you get overbooked
items.preamble:
“
        You know what I realized I missed when all my meetings went remote? Breathers and breaks between them.

I was feeling the overbooked calenda…
items.description:
“
        You know what I realized I missed when all my meetings went remote? Breathers and breaks between them.

I was feeling the overbooked calendar burn and noticed I had to keep apologizing at the start of a meeting when I had to take a few minutes to run to the bathroom or grab a coffee — because I had been booked back-to-back for 3 or 4+ hours and hadn't been able to step away from the screen.

I kept thinking, "I wish my calendar would just realize that I've been in meetings for way too long and probably need to pee or eat. It should just auto-add a break after a few hours and prevent me from getting booked like this."

That didn't exist, so I decided to make it. First for me. Then for my team. And now for any and all busy people out there who could really use a few more breaks.

Now, BreakBot is real, it's free, and at Trainual, we rely on it daily. We hope it helps a ton of folks like me who had been losing control of their calendars.

So step away, stretch, get some water, take a break. BreakBot makes sure you don't neglect yourself during even the busiest of days.
        ”

        – Jonathan Ronzio

        Discussion
        |
        Link

items.title: Convertmind — Google analytics monitoring & audits to increase conversions
items.preamble:
“
        👋 Hi Producthunt! I’m Gijs, a conversion (CRO) specialist who co-founded Convertmind. What a journey it has been! From the first ideas and …
items.description:
“
        👋 Hi Producthunt! I’m Gijs, a conversion (CRO) specialist who co-founded Convertmind. What a journey it has been! From the first ideas and the first beta testers till the live version we’re on now.

The problem
You want to increase your conversion rate and know the answers are somewhere in Google Analytics. It has so much data, but where should you be looking? Analyzing is hard and time consuming.

If you hire a conversion specialist to dig deep into your Google Analytics account to find conversion insights, it costs you more than $2500. Labor by hand. Clicking through reports. Writing down numbers. It takes time and requires experience.

After providing manual Google Analytics audits to hundreds of customers, I met a smart marketer and a handy developer: 'Isn't this something we can automatically do by scanning Google Analytics data?' they asked. Convertmind was born.

Another thing we heard from many marketers is that they often find out days later that something broke on their site. Such as a checkout that broke or a sudden decrease in traffic from a source. This problem is something we also wanted to solve.

The solution
Get automated recommendations based on Google Analytics, focussed on increasing your conversions.

✅ Save time on Google Analytics analysis + reporting
✅ Find hidden conversion opportunities, you probably won’t find yourself
✅ Detect anomalies when they happen, not days later

Features

👉  Audits for more conversions
Automated conversion audits for Google Analytics. Our algorithm analyzes all your Google Analytics data and reveals the most important conversion issues on your website.

👉  Monitoring of Google Analytics
24/7 anomaly detection for Google Analytics. Know when something breaks with instant alerts. Did we say it's super easy to set it up?

Give it a try
You can now give it a try with our free 14-day trial, no credit card required. Sign up with your Google Analytics account and find hidden conversion leaks.

Curious to hear what you think about Convertmind and thanks for checking it out! If you have any questions let me know 🙌.
        ”

        – Gijs Wierda

        Discussion
        |
        Link

items.preamble:

        Hey PH! 👋

This is Hussain from UltraNote. UltraNote is a new tool that lets you have take/read from notes (and collaborate with your team)…
items.description:
“
        Hey PH! 👋

This is Hussain from UltraNote. UltraNote is a new tool that lets you have take/read from notes (and collaborate with your team) during customer conversations without looking away from them, which keeps you from breaking eye contact and maintain rapport with your customers. You can also make your notes in advance in the dashboard so you can rely on them in your conversations.

Initially, I made a basic version of this tool to help me in my customer conversations and avoid looking at my second screen or my notepad, I like to appear confident and attentive. Later, I figured it might be able to help others too so I productized this tool and here we are.

Here are the highlights:

📁 You get your own Google Drive-like dashboard to make and organize your notebooks.

items.title: Ghost 4.0 — Newsletters, memberships, subscriptions - all in one place
items.preamble:
“
        Hey Product Hunters 👋

It's been 8 years since the first version of Ghost launched on Kickstarter and I'm really excited to share Ghost 4.0…
items.description:
“
        Hey Product Hunters 👋

It's been 8 years since the first version of Ghost launched on Kickstarter and I'm really excited to share Ghost 4.0 with you today.

We've shipped more than ever and doubled our team since our last major release back in October 2019. There's so much new stuff it doesn't all fit into a single post, but here's some of the highlights:

📈 We built the dashboard! Now you get real stats on how many posts are read, who's reading them, and who your most engaged members are.

💰 Native memberships and subscriptions are no longer in beta. Publishers who started Ghost sites with Ghost last year are already making more than $2Million per year in revenue. 135 currencies supported, with 0% payment fees.

📬 Email newsletters are built-in too — Whenever you publish a post, you can deliver it by email to all your members. A year ago we sent about 6,000 emails a month. Today: Several million.

👩‍💻 New member management features allow creators to easily import, keep track of and offer support to their members.

💅 We've released several popular themes, free and open source, alongside a brand new theme marketplace and experts directory. Sites are easier to customise too, with simple brand settings inside Ghost Admin.

⚡️ Plus, a host of new integrations, a brand new $9 starter plan and code refactors that have improved overall performance!

We've come a long way in 8 years, and Ghost is now a team of 21, with $3.3M annual revenue, still structured as a nonprofit organisation, and still making everything we do open source. As always, thanks so much for all your support!

Full changelog here:
https://ghost.org/changelog/4/
        ”

        – John O'Nolan

items.preamble:
“
        Hello Hunters 👋

I am Gourav from Crove.app. Very happy and excited to launch crove on product hunt today!

Crove.app allows you to convert…
items.description:
“
        Hello Hunters 👋

I am Gourav from Crove.app. Very happy and excited to launch crove on product hunt today!

Crove.app allows you to convert your office documents into intelligent templates which use variables and IF/Else conditions so that you can generate repetitive business documents as per your business logic.

Anyone who currently edits word or Google doc templates to create offer letters, contracts, quotes, invoices, lease agreements, etc., can make their life easy with Crove.app.

We also provide a resourceful template gallery which we will continuously update, where you can get templates of different industries like HR, Real Estate, Legal for free.

You can pick any template from our template gallery and make it yours with Crove!

When you use crove, you get:

❇️ 1. A simple mobile-friendly questionnaire, filling, which generates the document defined by your template.

❇️ 2. Crove makes it easy to delegate repetitive documentation tasks to junior employees in the company or even to a layman because filling the questionnaire generates the document.

❇️ 3. You save a lot of your time spent editing and formatting the template because any day filling a form is much easier than editing a template at multiple places.

❇️ 4. You never have to get embarrassed in front of your clients or employees when you forget to update the details of the previous person in your template. 😒

❇️ 5. Record of every document generated is stored in your crove.app account so that you can view, download, edit, delete your generated documents anytime on any device.

❇️ 6. You will have a straightforward form to generate multiple document variants. For example: With Crove.app you will use only one form to generate offer letters for male employees and female employees. Crove will handle he/she, his/her in the generated offer letter with the IF/Else conditions

You can start using crove.app by going to  Crove.app  and click on Try Now for Free button present at many places on the website.

I am excited to receive any comments or feedback from the community; please free to drop any comments or reviews. ❤️

Note: By the end of March, our Zapier Integration will also go live, with which anyone can connect crove.app with their favorite apps!
        ”

What is Market…
items.description:
“
        Hey everyone!

I'm excited to bring you this great new functionality inside of MarketPlan.io: Image and Video Collaboration.

What is MarketPlan?

For those of you who haven't heard of MarketPlan, it is the one platform where you can put your entire marketing campaigns and funnels into action.

Pitch your services to clients. Map out your marketing funnels. Collaborate with your team. Project your budget and revenue. Track your entire campaign with live analytics.

And now. Collaborate directly on marketing assets with our new image and video collaboration features all from one app, and also you can signup completely for free!

Why is image and video collaboration important?

It's simple.

We, and so many others who are running funnels for their clients, or their businesses produce a lot of marketing content. Ad graphics, videos, blog posts, thumbnails, animations, and so much more.

We needed a place to easily communicate and create all of the creative assets that go into making a successful marketing campaign or funnel.

So we made an app to handle all of the team collaboration for businesses, and back and forth for agencies and their clients to make reviewing and creating media for funnels very simple.

How can I get access?

If you want to signup for MarketPlan, it's FREE! We also have a very special offer available for you who check us out through Product Hunt, so be sure to head to our website for the full details.

And of course we would love to hear from you, so let us know your questions or comments down below!
        ”

        Hi fellow makers and product hunters 👋

As a startup founder myself, I know how important it is to name our startups properly. It's one of the top five steps we take when building our startups.

But sadly, it's one of the hardest too. Time spent brainstorming names, doodling logos for them, exploring the legal side of it, and after all the work we'll find that .com is taken or listed for thousands of dollars.

It's nothing wrong if domain names are squatted, parked with ads and sold for a few hundred dollars. It's working for them and helping them pay bills but for us, not so much. There are also instances where inexperienced domain owners value their domains for more than $10,000 when in reality it is only valued at say $2000.

At some point, it becomes unnegotiable and let's face it, you can spend that money on your startups instead.

I'm here to help you do exactly that. I'm here to change the domain name scene.

With The Netly Domains, you'll never have to pay $4829 for the perfect domain name again.

items.title: R2Devops Hub — Create powerful CI/CD pipelines, easily
items.preamble:
“
        Hello Product Hunt 👋

We are Alexandre, Aurélien, Thomas & Sandra, and we are building R2Devops!

No matter what you are developing, if…
items.description:
“
        Hello Product Hunt 👋

We are Alexandre, Aurélien, Thomas & Sandra, and we are building R2Devops!

No matter what you are developing, if you’re not using CI/CD, your project will die. Developing a platform or an app is more than just coding. Tests, deployments, documentation… all this is necessary for your project survival.

DevOps revolution simplified the automation of these tasks (called jobs) executed in CI/CD pipelines. However, their implementation is still time-consuming, and prevent your team from focusing on what matters: deliver value to your users. The problem we want to solve (and that we encounter in our developers life), is the huge pain to create from scratch and maintain CI/CD pipelines again and again for each of our projects.

So we have decided to create a free, open-source and collaborative collection of plug-and-play GitLab CI/CD jobs. These jobs are created following best practices, ensuring their adaptability to a lot of contexts and their capacity to truly help developers, and not just being obstacles.

This hub is the heart of the R2Devops platform, and we are currently working on building and growing a community of users to collect their feedback.

Let us know what you think about it! 😄

If CI/CD is new for you, our bot R2 can help you configure your first pipeline 👇
https://bit.ly/30QXp1g
        ”

        – Sandra Salerno

items.description:
“
        Hi Product Hunters 👋

I'm excited to announce beta access to Dola, a 1-click checkout and digital wallet.

After years of forgetting passwords, and saying to myself "why's this checkout form so long," "what's my password again," and "why doesn't this site have Apple Pay," I decided to do something about it.

Now, everyone can have a fast 1-click checkout that works on any browser and device.

Beta's available for consumers in every country; including merchants in the UK and US.

To get started, just:

Sign up: https://dola.me
Test-drive #1: https://swag.dola.me
Test-drive #2: https://bep.life/

If you'd like to add Dola to your website, go to your wallet's Settings page, find Merchant Services, and click Apply. Once you have completed onboarding, you can install Dola on any no-code builder or static website.

Additionally, Dola comes with an:

API: https://docs.dola.me
Open source shopping cart: https://github.com/dolapay/backendless-ecommerce-platform
SDK: https://github.com/dolapay/backendless-ecommerce-platform#javascript-sdk
Zapier App: https://zapier.com/apps/dola/integrations

To access your API Key, go to Settings and click Developer Tools.

If you have any questions, feel free to comment below or join our Discord: https://discord.gg/9ZbKMH

Much ❤️
Sergio
        ”

        – surgieboi
